glosses.ja: クラブ; ナイトクラブ

sentences.target: On se retrouve au club après le travail.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv o klœb apʁɛ lə tʁavaj/

translations.fr: On se retrouve au club après le travail.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv o klœb apʁɛ lə tʁavaj/
translations.en: We’re meeting at the club after work.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el club después del trabajo.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns nach der Arbeit im Club.
translations.it: Ci vediamo al club dopo il lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 下班后我们在俱乐部见面。
translations.yue: 我哋放工之後喺俱樂部見。
translations.pt: A gente se encontra no clube depois do trabalho.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở câu lạc bộ sau giờ làm.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar na het werk bij de club.
translations.hi: काम के बाद हम क्लब में मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się w klubie po pracy.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε στο κλαμπ μετά τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Vi møtes på klubben etter jobb.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di klub setelah kerja.
translations.sv: Vi ses på klubben efter jobbet.
translations.ro: Ne vedem la club după serviciu.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se v klubu po práci.
translations.da: Vi mødes i klubben efter arbejde.
translations.ja: 仕事の後でクラブで会おう。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular agreement with the verb.
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun preceding the verb, forming the pronominal verb 'se retrouver' (here: meet up).
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; pronominal with 'se'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the definite article 'le' (à + le); introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'travail'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'après'.

sentences.target: Je m'inscris au club de tennis demain.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mɛ̃skʁi o klœb də tenis dəmɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je m'inscris au club de tennis demain.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mɛ̃skʁi o klœb də tenis dəmɛ̃/
translations.en: I’m signing up for the tennis club tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana me inscribo en el club de tenis.
translations.de: Ich melde mich morgen im Tennisclub an.
translations.it: Domani mi iscrivo al club di tennis.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天要报名网球俱乐部。
translations.yue: 我聽日會報名加入網球會。
translations.ru: Завтра я запишусь в теннисный клуб.
translations.pt: Amanhã vou me inscrever no clube de tênis.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi đăng ký vào câu lạc bộ quần vợt.
translations.nl: Morgen schrijf ik me in bij de tennisclub.
translations.uk: Завтра я запишусь до тенісного клубу.
translations.hi: मैं कल टेनिस क्लब में नाम लिखवाऊँगा.
translations.pl: Jutro zapisuję się do klubu tenisowego.
translations.nb: I morgen melder jeg meg inn i tennisklubben.
translations.id: Besok saya mendaftar ke klub tenis.
translations.sv: I morgon anmäler jag mig till tennisklubben.
translations.ro: Mâine mă înscriu la clubul de tenis.
translations.cs: Zítra se přihlásím do tenisového klubu.
translations.da: I morgen melder jeg mig ind i tennisklubben.
translations.ja: 明日テニスクラブに入会します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Finite verb with attached reflexive clitic 'm'' (me); present indicative 1st person singular of the pronominal verb 's'inscrire' (to register oneself).
Preposition 'à' contracted with 'le' (à + le); introduces the destination/place.
Common noun, masculine; complement of the preposition 'au'.
Preposition linking the head noun with a noun complement ('de tennis').
Invariable common noun; complement of 'club' via 'de'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates future time.

sentences.target: Notre club organise un tournoi ce week-end.
sentences.reading: /nɔtʁə klœb ɔʁɡaniz œ̃ tuʁnwa sə wikɛnd/

translations.fr: Notre club organise un tournoi ce week-end.
translations.ipa: /nɔtʁə klœb ɔʁɡaniz œ̃ tuʁnwa sə wikɛnd/
translations.en: Our club is organizing a tournament this weekend.
translations.es: Nuestro club organiza un torneo este fin de semana.
translations.de: Unser Verein veranstaltet am Wochenende ein Turnier.
translations.it: Il nostro club organizza un torneo questo fine settimana.
translations.ko: 우리 클럽이 이번 주말에 대회를 연다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们俱乐部这个周末要举办一场比赛。
translations.yue: 我哋個俱樂部呢個週末會搞個比賽。
translations.ru: Наш клуб проводит турнир в эти выходные.
translations.pt: Nosso clube vai organizar um torneio neste fim de semana.
translations.he: המועדון שלנו מארגן טורניר בסוף השבוע הזה.
translations.tr: Kulübümüz bu hafta sonu bir turnuva düzenliyor.
translations.vi: Câu lạc bộ của chúng tôi tổ chức một giải đấu vào cuối tuần này.
translations.ar: نادينا ينظّم بطولة في نهاية这个 الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Onze club organiseert dit weekend een toernooi.
translations.uk: Наш клуб організовує турнір на цих вихідних.
translations.hu: A klubunk ezen a hétvégén tornát rendez.
translations.hi: हमारा क्लब इस सप्ताहांत एक टूर्नामेंट आयोजित कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Nasz klub organizuje turniej w ten weekend.
translations.el: Ο σύλλογός μας διοργανώνει ένα τουρνουά αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.nb: Klubben vår arrangerer en turnering denne helgen.
translations.id: Klub kami mengadakan turnamen akhir pekan ini.
translations.sv: Vår klubb ordnar en turnering i helgen.
translations.ro: Clubul nostru organizează un turneu în acest weekend.
translations.cs: Náš klub pořádá tento víkend turnaj.
translations.da: Vores klub arrangerer en turnering i weekenden.
translations.ja: 私たちのクラブは今週末に大会を開催します。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; agrees with the noun 'club'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'tournoi'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'organise'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; specifies the time expression.
Hyphenated loanword noun; forms a temporal noun phrase ('ce week-end') functioning as an adverbial complement.

sentences.target: Tu viens au club de lecture ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty vjɛ̃ o klœb də lɛktyʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu viens au club de lecture ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty vjɛ̃ o klœb də lɛktyʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: Are you coming to the book club tonight?
translations.es: ¿Vienes al club de lectura esta noche?
translations.de: Kommst du heute Abend zum Buchclub?
translations.it: Vieni al circolo di lettura stasera?
translations.ko: 오늘 저녁 독서 모임에 올 거야?
translations.yue: 你今晚嚟唔嚟讀書會呀？
translations.ru: Ты придёшь сегодня вечером в книжный клуб?
translations.pt: Você vai ao clube do livro hoje à noite?
translations.tr: Bu akşam kitap kulübüne geliyor musun?
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn có đến câu lạc bộ sách không?
translations.ar: هل ستأتي إلى نادي القراءة الليلة؟
translations.nl: Kom je vanavond naar de leesclub?
translations.uk: Прийдеш сьогодні ввечері на книжковий клуб?
translations.hi: क्या तुम आज रात बुक क्लब में आ रहे हो?
translations.pl: Idziesz dziś wieczorem na spotkanie klubu książki?
translations.nb: Kommer du på lesesirkelen i kveld?
translations.id: Kamu datang ke klub buku malam ini?
translations.sv: Kommer du till bokklubben i kväll?
translations.ro: Vii la clubul de carte diseară?
translations.cs: Přijdeš dnes večer do čtenářského klubu?
translations.da: Kommer du til bogklubben i aften?

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes a prepositional complement.
Preposition 'à' contracted with 'le' (à + le); marks destination.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'au'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement ('de lecture').
Common noun, feminine; complements 'club' ('club de lecture').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; part of the time expression.
Common noun, masculine; in 'ce soir' functions as a temporal complement.
